name: flesh_raptor.live_crowded_arc_skirmisher_mcw
description: Live crowded-arc raptor row: zombies occupy one side of the player while a staged flesh raptor records under-occupied arc choice, bounded swoop cadence, hit/equipment/frustration notes, and log/perf stability.

steps.label: post_load_raptor_crowded_arc_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: staged flesh-raptor crowded-arc fixture loads to live map

steps.label: audit_saved_noon_before_raptor_crowded_arc
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove expected noon turn before live flesh-raptor crowded-arc window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved turn proves local noon before crowded-arc raptor skirmish window

steps.label: audit_saved_flesh_raptor_and_zombies_before_crowded_arc
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain required raptor plus crowded north-arc zombie footing
steps.expected_visible_fact: one flesh raptor starts five tiles east and three zombies occupy the north arc

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_raptor_crowded_arc
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded live raptor crowded-arc window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: advance_raptor_crowded_arc_skirmish_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: bounded live turn window records the raptor choosing an under-occupied south/open arc tile, then periodic swoops and melee outcomes

steps.label: audit_flesh_raptor_crowded_arc_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact lacked under-occupied arc choice, cadence-swoop, or raptor melee-event lines
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves crowded-arc raptor planning avoids the zombie-occupied side by selecting an uncrowded five-tile orbit arc, keeps bounded swoop cadence, and records concrete melee hit/miss/armor-absorb outcomes for frustration metrics

evidence_contract.claim: a staged live flesh raptor uses the monster::plan seam to choose an under-occupied open orbit arc when ordinary zombies crowd the north arc, then periodically swoops and emits concrete combat-result metrics instead of stacking into the blob or behaving only as generic hit-and-run retreat
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for flesh-raptor crowded-arc behavior
evidence_contract.writeback_note: No save/writeback gate: this scenario proves bounded live-plan/combat behavior from current-run logs plus saved start-state footing; persistent map mutation is not part of the product claim. Equipment-damage frustration stays explicit through raptor melee_event hit/miss/armor-absorb outcomes and any destructive equipment messages if they appear; no equipment damage tuning is changed here.
